allow: Bash(flutter --version)
PowerShell(Get-Command *)
Bash(gh auth *)
Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=10")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{r[\\"head_sha\\"][:7]}  {r[\\"conclusion\\"]:8}  {r[\\"display_title\\"][:60]}'\) for r in d['workflow_runs']]")

PowerShell($d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=10"; $d.workflow_runs | Select-Object @{N='sha';E={$_.head_sha.Substring\(0,7\)}}, conclusion, @{N='title';E={$_.display_title.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$_.display_title.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/25817018621/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "JOB: $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\)"; $_.steps | Where-Object { $_.conclusion -eq 'failure' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  FAILED STEP: $\($_.name\)" } })

PowerShell($jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/25817018621/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-30} {1,-10} {2}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion, $_.number\) } })

PowerShell($run = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?head_sha=6f807bf2dba16ec0bf1a07d04e2dc0e02a8c61bd"; $runId = $run.workflow_runs[0].id; Write-Output "Run ID: $runId"; $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/$runId/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-35} {1}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion\) } })

PowerShell($runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=10"; $target = $runs.workflow_runs | Where-Object { $_.head_sha -eq '6f807bf2dba16ec0bf1a07d04e2dc0e02a8c61bd' } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($target\) { $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/$\($target.id\)/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-35} {1}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion\) } } } else { Write-Output "Not found - listing all SHAs:"; $runs.workflow_runs.head_sha | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.Substring\(0,7\) } })

PowerShell($runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=10"; $target = $runs.workflow_runs[1]; Write-Output "Targeting: $\($target.head_sha.Substring\(0,7\)\) status=$\($target.conclusion\)"; $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/$\($target.id\)/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-35} {1}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion\) } })

PowerShell($runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=5"; $target = $runs.workflow_runs | Where-Object { $_.head_sha.StartsWith\('a6fdb96'\) } | Select-Object -First 1; $jobs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/$\($target.id\)/jobs"; $jobs.jobs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "===== $\($_.name\) -> $\($_.conclusion\) ====="; $_.steps | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-35} {1}" -f $_.name, $_.conclusion\) } })

PowerShell($runs = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs?per_page=2"; $target = $runs.workflow_runs | Where-Object { $_.head_sha.StartsWith\('45f75d7'\) } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "Run id: $\($target.id\) conclusion: $\($target.conclusion\)"; $arts = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/himkhanna/travelPettyCash/actions/runs/$\($target.id\)/artifacts"; $arts.artifacts | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.name\) -> $\($_.archive_download_url\)" })
